file.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.app.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2023", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "types": ["vite/client"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,

    /* Bundler mode */
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",

    /* Linting */
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "noUncheckedSideEffectImports": true
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}

import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import './index.css'
import App from './App.tsx'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <App />
  </StrictMode>,
)

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Scaffold frontend with Vite + React 19 + TypeScript

Bootstrap the frontend/ directory using pnpm create vite with the react-ts
template. React 19.2.4, Vite 8, and TypeScript 5.9 with strict mode enabled.
Removed default boilerplate content, keeping a minimal App shell.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --draft --title "Scaffold frontend with Vite + React 19 + TypeScript" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Bootstrapped `frontend/` directory using `pnpm create vite` with the `react-ts` template
- React 19.2.4, Vite 8, TypeScript 5.9 with strict mode enabled
- Removed default Vite boilerplate content (logos, counter demo, social links), keeping a minimal App shell

## Test plan
- [ ] `cd frontend && pnpm install` succeeds with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm dev` starts the Vite dev server on localhost:5173
- [ ] `pnpm build` completes successfully
- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc -b` reports no TypeScript errors
- [ ] Verify React 19.x in `frontend/package.json`
- [ ] Verify `"strict": true` in `frontend/tsconfig.app.json`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
